keyFindings.buildScenarioGap: buildScenario() does NOT include factorSnapshot/usedSources/missingSources in its output
minimumSafeIntervention: Create P26ACorpusRowAdapter.ts as a read-only adapter

dataFlowTrace.step1: P3 corpus row => row.activeScoringSnapshot.factorSnapshot (10+ entries for P26A cases)
dataFlowTrace.step5: reviewCase() with no factorSnapshot => renderer fires as FALLBACK_EMPTY
dataFlowTrace.fix: Add factorSnapshot/usedSources/missingSources in buildScenario() => renderer fires as ENRICHED

rendererIntegrationState.firesAsENRICHED: only when WalkthroughCaseInput.factorSnapshot is provided and non-empty
rendererIntegrationState.firesAsFALLBACK_EMPTY: when factorSnapshot is empty or absent
